title: ABS Collateral Delinquency Migration — PNFED 2024-A
description: 60+ day delinquencies in the PNFED 2024-A collateral pool increased 42 bps month-over-month, crossing the 1.80% early-amortization trigger threshold. If the trend holds for one more reporting period (two consecutive at threshold), early amortization activates. Projected breach by August 2026. S&P surveillance review scheduled Q3 2026.

title: Interest Rate Hedge Effectiveness Drift
description: Swap portfolio effectiveness declined from 96.2% to 89.7% over the last 90 days. Three positions are driving the drift, correlated with the yield curve steepening since March. One position is already below the FASB ASC 815 80% minimum. Losing hedge accounting on at-risk positions would require $4.8M unrealized losses through earnings.

title: Counterparty Exposure Concentration — Auto Dealer Network
description: Top 5 auto dealer partners now represent 38% of new auto loan origination volume (up from 27% twelve months ago). Two of those dealers show declining financial health scores. Concentration risk impacts future ABS collateral quality and rating agency pool diversity requirements.
